summary: Completed comprehensive testing of sales cancellation feature. Backend API and frontend UI both working correctly. Successfully tested sale cancellation, stock restoration, status updates, and UI interactions.

design_issues.issue: Session appears to expire quickly, redirecting to login after navigation

passed_tests: Backend: Sale cancellation API endpoint works correctly
Frontend: Sales history page loads with proper data
Frontend: Summary cards display correct counts
Frontend: Sales table shows all sales with proper status badges
Frontend: Sale details modal opens and displays correctly
Frontend: Cancel sale confirmation dialog works
Frontend: Sale cancellation updates UI in real-time
Frontend: Cancelled sales show strikethrough pricing
Frontend: Summary cards update after cancellation
